events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young! Ringo Starr, the steady beat behind some of the greatest songs ever made, celebrates his birthday today. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the legendary Brian May! From stadium-rocking riffs with Queen to his work in astrophysics, he truly is a man of many talents. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! Sending birthday wishes to the one and only Mick Jagger, the ultimate rock and roll frontman. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV Launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched in the USA, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with that iconic first video. Did video really kill the radio star? We'll let you be the judge!

events.title: Oasis release Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Milestone
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. That album defined a generation and cemented their place in rock history. What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining moment of the counterculture generation, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music. The legendary Woodstock festival. If you could have been there, who would you have wanted to see?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: This day marks the anniversary of the death of the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: King's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. It's the anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing; he would have been 91. His music and influence are still as vital as ever.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas, passing away six days later. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Thirty years since the tragic shooting of Tupac Shakur. A voice that shaped a generation, gone too soon. He would have been 55. His legacy lives on through his powerful lyrics.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: This day marks the anniversary of the death of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix on the anniversary of his passing. He would have been 84. A true innovator whose sound continues to inspire.

events.title: The Beatles release Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover, on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is almost as famous as the music within. What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, her distinctive voice and attitude have powered The Pretenders for decades. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock N Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th to the one and only Liam Gallagher! The voice of a generation, still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment, musical or otherwise?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic peace anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released. A song that continues to resonate with its powerful message of peace and unity.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod, revolutionising portable music players and the way we listen to music.

angles.name: Music In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember this? Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod dropped and changed everything. Suddenly, you could carry '1,000 songs in your pocket'. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day celebrates the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme songs, what's your favourite 007 moment or tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: On this day, we remember John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: Today, we remember the visionary John Lennon, who would have been 86. His music and message of peace continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon song?
